title: Cross-file validators + path-contract reference sweep
description: Make scribe's validators operate across the partitioned files, and sweep the path contract: PROCESS.md, the scribe definition, the process-adherence rubric, and the publish targets all reference the partitioned layout instead of single-file issues.json/sprint paths.
acceptance_criteria: scribe's validators operate cross-file across the partitioned backlog and sprint records
PROCESS.md, the scribe definition, and the process-adherence rubric reference the partitioned paths
publish targets (execution-to-prd / execution-to-issues) point at the partitioned layout
no stale single-file issues.json or sprint path references remain in live docs
notes: New for sprint 2 under PRD-004. Shipped 2026-06-07 (sprint_2 item S2-7): scribe.md (+ src/template mirror, byte-identical) gained partition ownership + ## Partition mechanics + cross-file validation discipline. Landed mid-sprint as a chartered slice per ADR-0004; alignment PASS 0 violations over the partition doc set (.excn/prd-004_progress.json, step alignment_review_pass). PROCESS.md/process-adherence.md half authored by team-lead.
